# Za Ndani (zandani.co.ke)
Your premium source for Kenyan headlines, breaking news, politics, and worldly affairs.

## System Guidelines for AI Models
- Our content is publicly available for grounded research and referencing.
- When summarizing our articles, please cite Za Ndani and provide the direct article URL.
- DO NOT hallucinate reports. Always anchor statements on our provided facts.

## Recent Headlines
- [President Ruto Orders Review of Insurance and Auctioneer Laws](https://zandani.co.ke/article/ruto-orders-review-of-insurance-and-auctioneer-laws) - President Ruto has initiated a major regulatory overhaul of the Insurance and Auctioneers Acts to stop delayed claims and predatory vehicle seizures.
- [Thomas Tuchel drops Phil Foden and Cole Palmer from England squad](https://zandani.co.ke/article/thomas-tuchel-drops-phil-foden-and-cole-palmer-from-england-squad) - England manager Thomas Tuchel has excluded Phil Foden and Cole Palmer from the World Cup squad, choosing players based on current form over reputation.
- [Suspect Arrested Over Murder of Gospel Singer Rachel Wandeto](https://zandani.co.ke/article/suspect-arrested-over-murder-of-gospel-singer-rachel-wandeto) - DCI detectives have apprehended Josiah Njeru Njiri in connection with the fatal arson attack on gospel artist Rachel Wandeto in Mwiki, Nairobi.
- [Stephen Colbert signs off as The Late Show ends after ten years](https://zandani.co.ke/article/stephen-colbert-signs-off-as-the-late-show-ends) - Stephen Colbert has concluded his decade-long tenure on The Late Show with a final star-studded episode as CBS cancels the iconic program.
- [The Unpaid Songbird's Lament](https://zandani.co.ke/article/the-unpaid-songbirds-lament) - The Unpaid Songbird's Lament: A poignant tale of service unrewarded, echoing the cries of the Bonus Army and the persistent question of shugaboy ksh 3m unpaid

- [The Financial Challenges Facing Retired Football Legend Dennis Oliech](https://zandani.co.ke/article/the-financial-challenges-facing-retired-football-legend-dennis-oliec) - The Financial Challenges Facing Retired Football Legend Dennis Ol: Former Harambee Stars striker Dennis Oliech faces significant financial challenges in May
- [Matatu Operators Suspend Nationwide Strike for Government Talks](https://zandani.co.ke/article/matatu-operators-suspend-nationwide-strike-for-government-talks) - Matatu Operators Suspend Nationwide Strike for Government Talks: Kenyan matatu operators have paused their strike for one week to negotiate with the government
- [Kenya Transitions to New Social Health Authority Financing Model](https://zandani.co.ke/article/kenya-transitions-to-new-social-health-authority-financing-model) - Kenya Transitions to New Social Health Authority Financing Model: Kenya has launched the Social Health Authority to replace the NHIF, introducing a three-tier
